name: eslint-gameface
description: Unified ESLint setup for Gameface HTML/CSS (workspace demo + eslint-plugin-gameface).

scripts.test: node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/catalog-whitelist.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/svg-support-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/feature-index-smoke.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/css-partial-property-values.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/css-no-unsupported-functions.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/css-restrictions.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/databind-syntax.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/scss-tolerant.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/html-embedded-inline-jsx.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/html-databind-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/jsx-databind-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/js-api-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/catalog-lint-matrix.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run test:extract-matrix&&node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/feature-index-smoke.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/html-embedded-inline-jsx.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/html-databind-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/jsx-databind-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/js-api-rules.mjs && node packages/eslint-plugin-gameface/tests/catalog-lint-matrix.mjs && npm run test:matrix:check
